title: Restored Splashes
description: Fixing splash texts in Notch's will.
body:
# What is this?

This resource pack restores splash texts that were removed at one point.

After Notch sold Minecraft, Microsoft removed various splash texts to either reject Notch's contributions or to maintain the company's family-friendly brand.

Note that this pack is intended only for the splashes modified in Java Edition.

I recommend the mod "[Cycle Title Screen Splash](https://modrinth.com/mod/ubb2Lt4u)" which refreshes the splash text every _n_ seconds.

# Restored splashes

_See [removed splashes](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_removed_features#Splashes) and [changed splashes](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Splash#Changed_splashes) on Minecraft Wiki._

## References to Notch

Removed by Microsoft after Notch's comments online.

- Made by Notch!
- The Work of Notch!
- 110813!

## Contentious splashes

Removed by Microsoft for the general public.

- Sexy!
- Woo, /v/!
- Привет Россия!
- Switches and ores!

[Translator's Note: "_Привет Россия_!" means "Hello Russia!"]

## Outdated splashes

Introduced and removed by Notch himself during the game's development, before Minecraft's official release.

- Pre-beta!
- Alpha version!
- 9.95 euro!
- Half price!
- Notch <3 ez!
- When it's finished!

Introduced and changed by Microsoft.

- [this splash text has been delayed until part 2]

## Others

- Check it out!	
- SOPA means LOSER in Swedish!
- Better than Prey!
- Hobo humping slobo babe!
- Woo, minecraftforum!
- Undocumented!
- Down with O.P.P.!
- Lewd with two dudes with food!
- Huge tracts of land!
- Totally forgot about Dre!
- Popping tags!
- Getting ready to show!
- Getting ready to know!
- Getting ready to drop!
- Getting ready to shock!
- Getting ready to freak!
- Getting ready to speak!
- "Noun" is an autonym!
